detaileddescription.para: Prefix macros to sync with dlog logger format MODULE macro also defined at dlog-internal.h

Global logging macros to log a message along with function/class name and line
level
debug level
format
string format
Provides unfiltered logging for global error level messages
Provides unfiltered logging for fps monitor
Provides unfiltered logging for update status
Provides unfiltered logging for render information
Provides unfiltered logging for debug information
Provides unfiltered logging for warning level messages

briefdescription.para: Initialization of time checker filter Note that filter must be thread_local scoped ThresholdFilter::New.
Shorten filter macro without default threshold value. It will make filter disabled as default. ThresholdFilter::New.
End of time checker without any prefix message ThresholdFilter::EndTimeCheck.
End of time checker with simple prefix message ThresholdFilter::EndTimeCheck.

memberdef.name: DALI_TIME_CHECKER_END_WITH_MESSAGE_GENERATOR
memberdef.initializer: if(filter && filter->IsEnabled()) \ { \ std::ostringstream oss; \ messageGenerator(oss); \ filter->EndTimeCheck(oss.str().c_str(), \ DALI_LOG_FORMAT_PREFIX_ARGS); \ }

briefdescription.para: End of time checker with prefix message generator ThresholdFilter::EndTimeCheck.
Used for scope time check. It check time around a scope.
